programs.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programs.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programs.title: The Book of Clarence
programs.desc: A down-on-his-luck man struggles to find a better life for his family while fighting to free himself of debt. Captivated by the power and glory of the rising Messiah, he risks everything to carve his own path to a divine life, ultimately discovering that the redemptive power of belief may be his only way out.

programs.title: The Bob's Burgers Movie
programs.desc: A ruptured water main creates an enormous sinkhole right in front of Bob's Burgers, blocking the entrance indefinitely and ruining the Belchers' plans for a successful summer. While Bob and Linda struggle to keep the business afloat, the kids try to solve a mystery that could save their family's restaurant. As the dangers mount, these underdogs help each other find hope as they fight to get back behind the counter.

programs.title: The Simpsons Movie
programs.desc: The combination of Homer (Dan Castellaneta), his new pet pig, and a leaky silo full of excrement triggers a disaster that threatens not just Springfield but the entire world. An angry mob descends on the Simpson home, splitting the family. With Earth's fate in the balance, Homer sets out on a quest for redemption in order to save the world and earn Marge's (Julie Kavner) forgiveness.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.sub_title: Girls Just Want to Have Sums
programs.desc: Lisa masquerades as a boy when a new principal divides the school by gender.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Marge has amnesia and thinks she is single.
